text_effects: Hierarchical sizing: Headline is 250% of body text scale

illustration_style: Organic imperfect shapes with variable line weight
Flat color fills with slight offset or intentional whitespace
geometry: Asymmetric organic blobs within the illustration
textures: Subtle paper-grain overlay on illustration background
Simulated ink bleed on line art
Flat, matte surfaces without gradients or shadows
motifs: Circular orbit paths and dynamic swooshes
Simplified UI elements (checkmarks, mail icons, document sheets)
Circular avatar framing with high-contrast line art portrait

compositional_rules.spacing: Relaxed padding with consistent vertical gutters
compositional_rules.depth: Flat 2D planes; depth created solely through color layering, not shadows
compositional_rules.hierarchy: Visual-first entry point (Hero Image) followed by bold summary and detailed body
compositional_rules.alignment: Strict left-margin alignment for all text elements
